passives.name: Super Mech Armor
passives.effects: {{tip|Turret}} basic attacks are modified to deal {{as|7% of this minion's '''maximum''' health}} as {{tt|pre-mitigation damage|Damage calculated before modifiers}}.

effects_structured.raw: Turret basic attacks deal damage equal to 7% of this minion's max health as pre-mitigation damage.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Item page redirects to Super minion; this entry models super-minion turret-shot interaction rules, not champion-owned item behavior.
